| Button | @patternfly/react-core | Available |
| Card | @patternfly/react-core | Available (replaces Tile) |
| Content | @patternfly/react-core | Available (renamed from Text) |
| Form / FormGroup | @patternfly/react-core | Available |
| Label | @patternfly/react-core | Available (replaces Chip) |
| Modal | @patternfly/react-core | Available |
| Page / PageSection | @patternfly/react-core | Available |
| Select | @patternfly/react-core | Available |
| Table | @patternfly/react-table | Available |
| Tabs | @patternfly/react-core | Available |
| TextInput | @patternfly/react-core | Available |
| Toolbar | @patternfly/react-core | Available |

### Deprecated/Replaced Components:
- **Chip** -> Use **Label** instead
- **Tile** -> Use **Card** instead
- **Text** -> Renamed to **Content**
- **DragDrop** -> Deprecated (use updated Table demos for drag patterns)

## Migration Notes

### From v5 to v6:

#### Step 1: Update Dependencies
```bash
npm install @patternfly/react-core@^6.4.0 @patternfly/react-table@^6.4.0 @patternfly/react-icons@^6.4.0 @patternfly/patternfly@^6.4.0
```

#### Step 2: Run Codemods
```bash
npx @patternfly/pf-codemods@latest <path-to-source> --v6 --fix
```

Additional codemods available:
- `class-name-updater`: Updates CSS class names
- `tokens-update`: Updates CSS variables in React code
- `css-vars-updater`: Updates CSS variables in .css, .scss, .md files

#### Step 3: Update CSS Overrides
- All existing CSS overrides targeting PatternFly 5 styles **will break**
- New design token system changes variable names
- Remove or update all custom CSS overrides

#### Step 4: Update Breakpoint Logic
- PatternFly 6 uses **rem** units instead of pixels
- Divide any pixel-based breakpoint values by 16

### Breaking Changes Summary:
1. **Component renames**: Text -> Content, Chip -> Label, Tile -> Card
2. **CSS Design Tokens**: All variable names changed
3. **Victory Charts**: Import path changed from `@patternfly/react-charts` to `@patternfly/react-charts/victory`
4. **ExpandableSection**: Removed `isActive` prop
5. **EmptyState**: Significant refactoring (may require manual updates)
6. **DOMpurify**: No longer a dependency (uninstall from your codebase)
7. **MessageBar**: Now uses PatternFly TextArea (TypeScript type changes)

## Installation Commands

### Fresh Installation (React 19 + PatternFly 6):
```bash
# Install React 19
npm install react@^19 react-dom@^19

# Install PatternFly 6 packages
npm install @patternfly/react-core@^6.4.0 \
            @patternfly/react-table@^6.4.0 \
            @patternfly/react-icons@^6.4.0 \
            @patternfly/patternfly@^6.4.0
```

### CSS Import (required in app entry point):
```javascript
// Add BEFORE your main application component import
import '@patternfly/react-core/dist/styles/base.css';
```

### If Using Charts (Victory is now optional):
```bash
npm install @patternfly/react-charts@^6.4.0 victory
```

npm install @patternfly/react-core@^6.4.0 \
            @patternfly/react-table@^6.4.0 \
            @patternfly/react-icons@^6.4.0 \
            @patternfly/patternfly@^6.4.0

# Run codemods
npx @patternfly/pf-codemods@latest ./src --v6 --fix
```

- **Component Animations**: Fade-in, slide-in transitions for Accordion, Expandable Section, Navigation, Tree View
- **Resizable Table Columns**: New in @patternfly/react-data-view

| Page / PageSection | @patternfly/react-core | Available |
| Select | @patternfly/react-core | Available |
| Table | @patternfly/react-table | Available |
| Tabs | @patternfly/react-core | Available |
| TextInput | @patternfly/react-core | Available |
| Toolbar | @patternfly/react-core | Available |

### Deprecated/Replaced Components:
- **Chip** -> Use **Label** instead
- **Tile** -> Use **Card** instead
- **Text** -> Renamed to **Content**
- **DragDrop** -> Deprecated (use updated Table demos for drag patterns)

## Migration Notes

### From v5 to v6:

#### Step 1: Update Dependencies
```bash
npm install @patternfly/react-core@^6.4.0 @patternfly/react-table@^6.4.0 @patternfly/react-icons@^6.4.0 @patternfly/patternfly@^6.4.0
```

#### Step 2: Run Codemods
```bash
npx @patternfly/pf-codemods@latest <path-to-source> --v6 --fix
```

Additional codemods available:
- `class-name-updater`: Updates CSS class names
- `tokens-update`: Updates CSS variables in React code
- `css-vars-updater`: Updates CSS variables in .css, .scss, .md files

#### Step 3: Update CSS Overrides
- All existing CSS overrides targeting PatternFly 5 styles **will break**
- New design token system changes variable names
- Remove or update all custom CSS overrides

#### Step 4: Update Breakpoint Logic
- PatternFly 6 uses **rem** units instead of pixels
- Divide any pixel-based breakpoint values by 16

### Breaking Changes Summary:
1. **Component renames**: Text -> Content, Chip -> Label, Tile -> Card
2. **CSS Design Tokens**: All variable names changed
3. **Victory Charts**: Import path changed from `@patternfly/react-charts` to `@patternfly/react-charts/victory`
4. **ExpandableSection**: Removed `isActive` prop
5. **EmptyState**: Significant refactoring (may require manual updates)
6. **DOMpurify**: No longer a dependency (uninstall from your codebase)
7. **MessageBar**: Now uses PatternFly TextArea (TypeScript type changes)

## Installation Commands

### Fresh Installation (React 19 + PatternFly 6):
```bash
# Install React 19
npm install react@^19 react-dom@^19

# Install PatternFly 6 packages
npm install @patternfly/react-core@^6.4.0 \
            @patternfly/react-table@^6.4.0 \
            @patternfly/react-icons@^6.4.0 \
            @patternfly/patternfly@^6.4.0
```

### CSS Import (required in app entry point):
```javascript
// Add BEFORE your main application component import
import '@patternfly/react-core/dist/styles/base.css';
```

### If Using Charts (Victory is now optional):
```bash
npm install @patternfly/react-charts@^6.4.0 victory
```

### Upgrade from v5 to v6:
```bash
# Update all PatternFly packages
npm install @patternfly/react-core@^6.4.0 \
            @patternfly/react-table@^6.4.0 \
            @patternfly/react-icons@^6.4.0 \
            @patternfly/patternfly@^6.4.0

# Run codemods
npx @patternfly/pf-codemods@latest ./src --v6 --fix
```

## Q3 2025 / Q4 2025 Features (v6.4)

- **High Contrast Mode (Beta)**: Higher-contrast colors, prominent borders
- **Component Animations**: Fade-in, slide-in transitions for Accordion, Expandable Section, Navigation, Tree View
- **Resizable Table Columns**: New in @patternfly/react-data-view
- **ChatBot Extension**: Enhanced navigation, message dividers, editing capabilities

## Sources

- [PatternFly Official Upgrade Guide](https://www.patternfly.org/get-started/upgrade/) - Migration steps and breaking changes
- [PatternFly Release Highlights](https://www.patternfly.org/get-started/release-highlights/) - Q2/Q3 2025 release notes
- [React 19 Migration Issue #201](https://github.com/patternfly/pf-roadmap/issues/201) - Completed migration tracking
- [React 19 Enhancements Initiative #239](https://github.com/patternfly/pf-roadmap/issues/239) - Future React 19 feature adoption
- [PatternFly React GitHub](https://github.com/patternfly/patternfly-react) - Source code and releases
- [npm @patternfly/react-core](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@patternfly/react-core) - Package information
- [PatternFly Development Guide](https://www.patternfly.org/get-started/develop/) - Getting started documentation
